sourceMovie.title: Primitive War
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Primitive War (2025) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and horror blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Resident Evil
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Primitive War clicked for you, Resident Evil (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and horror, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Primitive War?
faq.answer: Try Resident Evil, The Girl with All the Gifts, Extinction—each shares DNA with Primitive War while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Primitive War?
faq.answer: Primitive War (2025) is best described as Action, Horror, War, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Primitive War worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
